name: cache_miss_taxonomy
description: Exact, near-prefix, and divergent-prefix requests to force explicit cache-hit/miss reasons.
shared_context: Exact prefix block: same repo context and same system instruction.
Near prefix block: one metadata field changes while most tokens remain identical.
Divergent prefix block: early tokens differ so the prefix cache must reject reuse.
user_templates: Request {request_id}: classify this as exact, near, or divergent prefix reuse.
Request {request_id}: explain which cache miss reason should be recorded.
